mapper.sql: A.NCONFIG_INTERFACE_SEQ, A.SOFFICECODE, A.SFILE_NM, A.SHOST_IP , A.SHOST_NM, A.SIF_IP, A.PIF_INET, A.PIF_CIDR , A.SIF_NM, A.SIF_DESCRIPTION, A.NFLAG_LEVEL, A.SSAID , A.SLLUM, A.SCOMMENT, A.DCREATE_DT, A.SCREATE_ID , A.DMODIFY_DT, A.SMODIFY_ID

choose.when:
ORDER BY A.SHOST_IP
ASC
DESC
ASC

ORDER BY A.SIF_NM
ASC
DESC
ASC
choose.otherwise:
ORDER BY A.SHOST_IP
ASC
DESC
ASC

mapper.select: SELECT count(1) totalCount FROM FCT.TB_CONFIG_INTERFACE_MST A
